Hello Matthew,

We hope you are well. As an investor based in London, we wanted to share our quarterly market insights and provide an overview of opportunities and considerations relevant to your portfolio.

This quarter at a glance

  • Global equities showed resilient performance, led by select technology and renewable energy names.
  • Fixed-income yields remain sensitive to policy guidance from major central banks.
  • We continue to monitor geopolitical developments that may affect commodity prices and currency movements.

Recommended next steps
